postReview.title: Trouble in Hollywood as both Los Angeles teams lose in MLS
postReview.description: Both Los Angeles FC and the LA Galaxy slipped to MLS defeats on Saturday, as their underwhelming starts to the season continued.

preReview.title: San Diego FC v Los Angeles FC: Cherundolo relishing hometown return
preReview.description: Steve Cherundolo and Los Angeles FC will face San Diego FC for the first time in MLS on Saturday.
